title: 5 Hacks To Use ChatGPT So Well It's Almost Unfair
description:
In this video, I break down how I use ChatGPT, not as a chatbot or a junior assistant, but as a system that helps me move faster, think better, and focus on what actually matters.

This isn’t about clever prompts. It’s about designing a thinking system around AI.

I’ll share why these advantages won’t last forever, and why, as machines take over more labor, the real edge will become something deeper: judgment, empathy, and being more human.

If you want to use AI as leverage instead of novelty, this is how I do it.
